mapper.update: UPDATE sendMailSetting SET sendMailSettingManager = #{sendMailSettingManager}, sendMailSettingSubject = #{sendMailSettingSubject}, sendMailSettingSingle = ${sendMailSettingSingle}, sendMailSettingDaily = ${sendMailSettingDaily}, sendMailSettingRequester = #{sendMailSettingRequester}, sendMailSettingSalesManager = #{sendMailSettingSalesManager}, sendMailSettingIssuance = #{sendMailSettingIssuance} WHERE sendMailSettingTarget = #{sendMailSettingTarget};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mailSendList(mailSendListPage, mailSendListPageNumber, mailSendListRegistrant, mailSendListRegistrationDate) VALUES(#{mailSendListPage}, ${mailSendListPageNumber}, #{mailSendListRegistrant}, #{mailSendListRegistrationDate});
mapper.select: SELECT m.mailSendListKeyNum, m.mailSendListPage, m.mailSendListPageNumber, m.mailSendListRegistrant, e.employeeName, m.mailSendListRegistrationDate FROM mailSendList m LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.employeeId = m.mailSendListRegistrant WHERE mailSendListPage = #{mailSendListPage} AND mailSendListPageNumber = ${mailSendListPageNumber} ORDER BY mailSendListRegistrationDate DESC;
